commitMessage:
feat: added fixed unit option to the Network and Disk modules (#3231)

* Network monitor fixed unit

* Add fixed units to disk widget

* "fix" lint

current_content.value:
PreferencesSection([
                PreferencesRow(localizedString("Base"), component: selectView(
                    action: #selector(self.toggleBase),
                    items: SpeedBase,
                    selected: self.baseValue
                )),
                PreferencesRow(localizedString("Units"), component: selectView(
                    action: #selector(self.toggleSpeedUnit),
                    items: NetworkSpeedUnits,
                    selected: self.speedUnitValue
                ))
            ])

arguments.value:
PreferencesSection([
                PreferencesRow(localizedString("Base"), component: selectView(
                    action: #selector(self.toggleBase),
                    items: SpeedBase,
                    selected: self.baseValue
                )),
                PreferencesRow(localizedString("Units"), component: selectView(
                    action: #selector(self.toggleSpeedUnit),
                    items: NetworkSpeedUnits,
                    selected: self.speedUnitValue
                ))
            ])

old_content.value:
PreferencesSection([
                PreferencesRow(localizedString("Base"), component: selectView(
                    action: #selector(self.toggleBase),
                    items: SpeedBase,
                    selected: self.baseValue
                ))
            ])

arguments.value:
PreferencesSection([
                PreferencesRow(localizedString("Base"), component: selectView(
                    action: #selector(self.toggleBase),
                    items: SpeedBase,
                    selected: self.baseValue
                ))
            ])
